meta.title: Cheese and Charcuterie in Calgary | Mixler
meta.description: Learn to build a beautiful cheese and charcuterie board in Calgary. Taste great cheese, learn pairing basics, and take the skills home. All experience levels welcome.

content.subtitle: Taste great cheese, learn the pairings, and build a board worth showing off.
content.intro: Cheese and charcuterie events in Calgary are the kind of evening where you show up thinking it's going to be casual and end up leaving with actual knowledge. A cheesemonger or host walks you through a selection of cheeses, explains what makes each one different, and shows you how to build a board that balances flavours and textures. It's delicious and genuinely educational.

what_to_expect.heading: Guided cheese tasting
what_to_expect.body: You'll taste a curated selection of cheeses from different milk types and regions. The host explains what you're tasting and why.

what_to_expect.heading: Charcuterie and accompaniments
what_to_expect.body: Cured meats, pickles, honey, jams, and crackers are all part of the spread. You learn how to balance flavours across the board.

what_to_expect.heading: Pairing principles
what_to_expect.body: You'll learn basic pairing logic for wine, beer, or other drinks that complement different cheese styles.

what_to_expect.heading: Board building technique
what_to_expect.body: The host shows you how to arrange a board for visual appeal and flow. It's a skill that transfers directly to hosting at home.

tips: Let cheese come to room temperature before serving. Cold cheese mutes the flavour significantly.
Use at least three different cheese styles: a soft, a semi-firm, and an aged. It gives your board real range.
Calgary has specialty food shops with excellent imported and local cheese selections worth exploring after your class.
Label your cheeses when you host at home. Guests always want to know what they're eating.
Mixler lists cheese and charcuterie events in Calgary when they're scheduled. Join the waitlist and we'll let you know first.
content.waitlist_heading: Want to know when we run cheese and charcuterie events?
content.waitlist_body: Join the waitlist and we'll email you when we add one. We use this to plan what to run next.

faq.q: Do I need to know anything about cheese?
faq.a: No cheese knowledge required. The host covers everything, including how to taste and describe what you're eating.
No. Charcuterie, condiments, crackers, and pairings are all part of it. You build and taste a full board.

faq.q: Can I eat as much as I want?
faq.a: You're there to taste and enjoy, not just sample. Most events provide generous portions.
Very much so. Cheese and charcuterie is a naturally social format. People share, compare opinions, and eat well together.
